name: Flicker
description:
Active: Flicker

Dispells debuffs and blinks you in a random forward direction for a random distance between %min_range% and %max_range%. If cast within 3 seconds of receiving player damage, it will blink in place.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: The technically-true-to-his-word 'teleportation device' crafted by a notorious fae trickster.
